---
title: "Merge Updated At-Risk Reports into Atlas Reports"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(writexl)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
```

```{r merge-at-risk-atlas}
root_dir <- "."

at_risk_files <- list(
  JES = file.path(root_dir, "JES At Risk Report_Updated 6.15.26 (PW_ #JES2026).xlsx"),
  JMTES = file.path(root_dir, "JMTES At Risk Report_Updated 6.15.26 (PW_ #MTE2026).xlsx")
)

grade_dirs <- c("Kindergarten", "Grade 1", "Grade 2", "Grade 3", "Grade 4", "Grade 5")

read_at_risk <- function(path) {
  read_excel(path, skip = 1, col_types = "text") |>
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ str_trim(as.character(.x)))) |>
    distinct(`State Report Id`, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    rename_with(~ paste0("At Risk - ", .x))
}

find_header_row <- function(path, id_columns = c("ID Number", "Student IDs", "Student ID"), max_rows = 10) {
  preview <- read_excel(path, col_names = FALSE, n_max = max_rows, col_types = "text")
  matches <- apply(preview, 1, function(row) any(str_trim(row) %in% id_columns, na.rm = TRUE))
  header_row <- which(matches)[1]
  if (is.na(header_row)) {
    stop("Could not find Atlas ID header row in: ", path)
  }
  header_row
}

read_atlas <- function(path) {
  header_row <- find_header_row(path)
  read_excel(path, skip = header_row - 1, col_types = "text") |>
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ str_trim(as.character(.x))))
}

merge_one_atlas <- function(path, at_risk_data) {
  atlas_data <- read_atlas(path)
  atlas_id_column <- intersect(c("ID Number", "Student IDs", "Student ID"), names(atlas_data))[1]
  if (is.na(atlas_id_column)) {
    stop("Could not identify Atlas student ID column in: ", path)
  }

  merged_data <- atlas_data |>
    left_join(
      at_risk_data,
      by = setNames("At Risk - State Report Id", atlas_id_column),
      relationship = "many-to-one"
    )

  output_path <- file.path(
    dirname(path),
    paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(path)), " - Merged At Risk.xlsx")
  )
  write_xlsx(merged_data, output_path)
  write_csv(merged_data, sub("\\.xlsx$", ".csv", output_path))
  output_path
}

at_risk_data <- map(at_risk_files, read_at_risk)

atlas_files <- unlist(map(grade_dirs, function(grade_dir) {
  list.files(
    file.path(root_dir, grade_dir),
    pattern = "Atlas Report.*\\.xlsx$",
    full.names = TRUE
  ) |>
    discard(~ str_detect(basename(.x), "Merged At Risk"))
}))

created_files <- map_chr(atlas_files, function(path) {
  school <- if (str_starts(str_to_upper(basename(path)), "JMTES")) "JMTES" else "JES"
  merge_one_atlas(path, at_risk_data[[school]])
})

created_files
```
